tests.description: Per-scenario single-vs-robust collision Fisher (GT=avec, scenario_01, class=single-danger)
tests.caveat: pseudo-replication: 3 single planners share seed/geometry, run-level n ~3x inflated, Fisher p anti-conservative (lower bound on true p)
